zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell於大約1620年出生在英國素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特。她於1643年2月5日與John Clary在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1681年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年62歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell于大约1620年出生在英国素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特。她于1643年2月5日与John Clary在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1681年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年62岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Cassell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name of Norman origin, from Cassel in the Nord department, Flanders, France.
English: sometimes a variant of   Castle  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Caisile, which is probably in origin a variant of Ó Caiside, see Cassidy .

variants.name: Cassells
meanings: Scottish: variant of Cassell , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cassel
meanings: German: variant of   Kassel  , cognate with 4 below.
Swedish: of German or English origin (see 1 and 2 above). Compare   Castel   3.

variants.name: Castle
meanings: English: topographic name from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English castel ‘castle, fortified building or set of buildings’, especially the residence of a feudal lord (from Late Latin castellum, a diminutive of castrum ‘fort, Roman walled city’). The name would also have denoted a servant who lived and worked at such a place, or someone who had an obligation to provide services or rent to a castle.

variants.name: Cashell
meanings: Irish (of Norman origin): variant of Cassell . In Clare it is also a shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Maolchaisil ‘descendant of the chief of Cashel’.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell was born about 1620, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England. She married John Clary on 5 February 1643, in Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 October 1681, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell est née environ 1620, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Clary le 5 février 1643, à Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1681, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassellは約1620年にイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで生まれた。1643年2月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーワテルトウンでJohn Claryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1681年10月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで62歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell(은)는 대략 1620년 영국 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1643년 2월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운에서 John Clary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1681년 10월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell nasceu aproximadamente 1620, em East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Clary em 5 de fevereiro de 1643, em Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1681, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell родилась около 1620 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Clary 5 февраля 1643 г. в местности вэитиртоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 октября 1681 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Sarah Cassell nació aproximadamente 1620, en East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con John Clary el 5 de febrero de 1643, en Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1681, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
